name: Finley 24x40 Garage Shed Plan - A Modern Garage for Style, Storage & Everyday Efficiency
open_features: 24x40 Garage Shed With Modern Sloped Roof
A streamlined single-slope roof creates a minimalist profile while maximizing vertical wall height and indoor working space.
Straightforward framing, modern geometry, and simple structural detailing make this an excellent build for beginners and experienced builders alike.
Three large rustic-modern garage doors provide wide, easy access for vehicles, tools, machinery, garden equipment, or workshop materials.
Rich wood siding, white trim, high clerestory-style windows, and modern lighting fixtures deliver a beautiful mix of rustic warmth and modern clean lines.
description_summary: Kickstart your next property upgrade with the Finley Garage Shed Plan - a 24x40 modern workshop and multi-vehicle garage designed for clean architectural simplicity, exceptional functionality, and warm exterior appeal. With its crisp single-slope roofline, rich natural wood siding, transom-style windows, and artisan herringbone garage doors, the Finley brings together modern design and practical storage in a way that elevates any backyard or homestead.
